# Signal Desk

Signal Desk is a React and TypeScript news aggregator case study. It combines normalized results from NewsAPI.org, The Guardian and The New York Times through a contract-first Hono backend, ranked by relevance and de-duplicated across sources.

## Useful links

- [Application](./)
- [Source repository](https://github.com/jb-thery/signal-desk)
- OpenAPI UI: `/docs` in the local or Docker Hono runtime only.
- OpenAPI contract: `/openapi.json` in the local or Docker Hono runtime only.
